name: Request Validation with Zod
description: Add Zod schema validation to all API endpoints. Request bodies, query params, and route params are validated at the boundary — invalid requests get a 400 with detailed error messages before touching business logic.

steps.description: Check Express version and existing validation setup
Create validate(schema) middleware that parses req.body with Zod and returns 400 on failure with ZodError details
Define createUserSchema, updateUserSchema, and loginSchema with Zod
Apply validate(createUserSchema) to POST /users, validate(updateUserSchema) to PUT /users/:id
Test that invalid payloads return 400 with field-level errors

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Type-safe request parsing — runtime validation from your TypeScript types
